name: Support shipping address change policy example
answer:
Customers may change a shipping address before an order ships.
Customers may request a shipping address change within 48 hours of placing an order.
Support provides free pet insurance with every address change.
answerLabel: Support shipping address change reviewer packet

sources.title: Support Shipping Address Change Policy
sources.content:
Customers may change a shipping address before an order ships through account order settings.
Customers must request a shipping address change within 2 hours of placing an order.
